hero_layout: diagonal split — angled divider between visual and text
nav_style: hidden on scroll down, shows on scroll up
contact_style: big bold email as hero text
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
quirk: use only two accent colors total throughout the entire page
bonus_quirk: the daily regen banner is styled as a handwritten note
